  • Constructor Details

    • RodinProjectSelectionGroup

      public RodinProjectSelectionGroup(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Listener listener, boolean allowNewProjectName)
      Creates a new instance of the widget.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent widget of the group.
      listener - A listener to forward events to. Can be null if no listener is required.
      allowNewProjectName - Enable the user to type in a new project name instead of just selecting from the existing ones.

    • RodinProjectSelectionGroup

      public RodinProjectSelectionGroup(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Listener listener, boolean allowNewProjectName, String message)
      Creates a new instance of the widget.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent widget of the group.
      listener - A listener to forward events to. Can be null if no listener is required.
      allowNewProjectName - Enable the user to type in a new project name instead of just selecting from the existing ones.
      message - The text to present to the user.

    • RodinProjectSelectionGroup

      public RodinProjectSelectionGroup(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Listener listener, boolean allowNewProjectName, String message, int heightHint, int widthHint)
      Creates a new instance of the widget.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent widget of the group.
      listener - A listener to forward events to. Can be null if no listener is required.
      allowNewProjectName - Enable the user to type in a new project name instead of just selecting from the existing ones.
      message - The text to present to the user.
      heightHint - height hint for the drill down composite
      widthHint - width hint for the drill down composite

  • Method Details

    • projectSelectionChanged

      public void projectSelectionChanged(IRodinProject project)
      The project selection has changed in the tree view. Update the project name field value and notify all listeners.
      Parameters:
      project - The project that changed

      public void createContents(String message)
      Creates the contents of the composite.

      message -

      widthHint -

    • createTreeViewer

      protected void createTreeViewer(int heightHint)
      Returns a new drill down viewer for this dialog.
      Parameters:
      heightHint - height hint for the drill down composite

    • getProject

      public IRodinProject getProject()
      Returns the currently entered project name. Null if the field is empty. Note that the project may not exist yet if the user entered a new project name in the field.

      Returns:
      String

    • setInitialFocus

      public void setInitialFocus()
      Gives focus to one of the widgets in the group, as determined by the group.

    • setSelectedProject

      public void setSelectedProject(IRodinProject project)
      Sets the selected existing project.
      Parameters:
      project -
